description: Efficiently update metrics for changed files only

constructor.example:
from scripts.incremental_generator import IncrementalGenerator
gen = IncrementalGenerator('workspace.db')

generate_file_metrics.signature: generate_file_metrics(file_path: str, existing_workspace: Optional[Dict] = None) -> Dict
generate_file_metrics.description: Generate metrics for a single file

generate_function_metrics.signature: generate_function_metrics(file_path: str, func_name: str, existing_workspace: Optional[Dict] = None) -> Dict
generate_function_metrics.description: Generate metrics for a specific function

merge_with_existing.description: Merge new metrics with existing workspace data

use_cases.incremental_update: Update only changed files without regenerating entire database
use_cases.ci_cd_pipeline: Efficiently refresh metrics in CI/CD without full regeneration
use_cases.file_watcher: Update metrics as files are modified during development
